creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Angelo Polo from comment #0)
Thanks very much for the patch! While adding that maven repo file is of course fine and what we did for a long time, I'm thinking if it is possible for ports using maven repo can do something like yarn:

  https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/tree/net-mgmt/chronograf/Makefile

or go-post-fetch for GO_MODULE:

  https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/tree/Mk/Uses/go.mk

?
